record.field: today = datetime.date.today() fy_start = today.replace(month=1, day=1) wiz = env["journal.ledger.report.wizard"].create({ "company_id": env.company.id, "date_from": fy_start, "date_to": today, "move_target": "posted", }) action = wiz.button_export_html()

today = datetime.date.today() fy_start = today.replace(month=1, day=1) wiz = env["general.ledger.report.wizard"].create({ "company_id": env.company.id, "date_from": fy_start, "date_to": today, "target_move": "posted", }) action = wiz.button_export_html()

today = datetime.date.today() fy_start = today.replace(month=1, day=1) wiz = env["trial.balance.report.wizard"].create({ "company_id": env.company.id, "date_from": fy_start, "date_to": today, "target_move": "posted", }) action = wiz.button_export_html()
today = datetime.date.today() wiz = env["open.items.report.wizard"].create({ "company_id": env.company.id, "date_at": today, "target_move": "posted", }) action = wiz.button_export_html()
today = datetime.date.today() wiz = env["aged.partner.balance.report.wizard"].create({ "company_id": env.company.id, "date_at": today, "target_move": "posted", }) action = wiz.button_export_html()

today = datetime.date.today() fy_start = today.replace(month=1, day=1) wiz = env["vat.report.wizard"].create({ "company_id": env.company.id, "date_from": fy_start, "date_to": today, "target_move": "posted", }) action = wiz.button_export_html()

today = datetime.date.today() wiz = env["aged.partner.balance.report.wizard"].create({ "company_id": env.company.id, "date_at": today, "target_move": "posted", "receivable_accounts_only": True, }) action = wiz.button_export_html()

today = datetime.date.today() wiz = env["aged.partner.balance.report.wizard"].create({ "company_id": env.company.id, "date_at": today, "target_move": "posted", "payable_accounts_only": True, }) action = wiz.button_export_html()
KOB: re-point UAT report menus to auto-open

mapping = { # Statement Reports "Balance Sheet": ("kob_account_reports.action_balance_sheet", "ir.actions.client"), "Profit and Loss": ("kob_account_reports.action_profit_loss", "ir.actions.client"), "Profit and Loss Default": ("kob_account_reports.action_profit_loss", "ir.actions.client"), "Cash Flow Statement": ("kob_account_reports.action_cash_flow", "ir.actions.client"), "Executive Summary": ("kob_account_reports.action_executive_summary", "ir.actions.client"), "Tax Return": ("kob_account_reports.action_tax_return", "ir.actions.client"), # Audit "Journal Audit": ("kob_account_reports.action_journal_audit", "ir.actions.client"), "General Ledger": ("kob_account_reports.action_general_ledger", "ir.actions.client"), "Trial Balance": ("kob_account_reports.action_trial_balance", "ir.actions.client"), # Partner "Partner Ledger": ("kob_account_reports.action_partner_ledger", "ir.actions.client"), "Aged Receivable": ("kob_account_reports.action_aged_receivable", "ir.actions.client"), "Aged Payable": ("kob_account_reports.action_aged_payable", "ir.actions.client"), # Management "Invoice Analysis": ("kob_account_reports.action_invoice_analysis", "ir.actions.client"), "Analytic Report": ("kob_account_reports.action_analytic_report", "ir.actions.client"), "Unrealized Currency Gains/Losses": ("kob_account_reports.action_unrealized_fx", "ir.actions.client"), "Deferred Expense": ("kob_account_reports.action_deferred_expense", "ir.actions.client"), "Deferred Revenue": ("kob_account_reports.action_deferred_revenue", "ir.actions.client"), "Depreciation Schedule": ("kob_account_reports.action_depreciation_schedule", "ir.actions.client"), "Disallowed Expenses": ("kob_account_reports.action_disallowed_expenses", "ir.actions.client"), "Budget Report": ("kob_account_reports.action_budget_report", "ir.actions.client"), "Loans Analysis": ("kob_account_reports.action_loans_analysis", "ir.actions.client"), # VAT report aliases "Purchase Tax Report": ("kob_account_reports.action_tax_return", "ir.actions.client"), "Sale Tax Report": ("kob_account_reports.action_tax_return", "ir.actions.client"), "VAT Report": ("kob_account_reports.action_tax_return", "ir.actions.client"), } for menu_name, (xmlid, model) in mapping.items(): rec = env.ref(xmlid, raise_if_not_found=False) if not rec: continue target_action = "%s,%d" % (model, rec.id) menus = env["ir.ui.menu"].search([("name", "=", menu_name)]) if menus: menus.write({"action": target_action})
